Class BaseCommand

java.lang.Object
simcli.engine.commands.BaseCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
ICommand
Direct Known Subclasses:
CharacterStatusCommand, HouseInfoCommand, InteractCommand, InventoryCommand, JobMarketCommand, MoveRoomCommand, SpouseInteractionCommand, SwitchSimCommand, TravelCommand, UpgradeRoomCommand, WorkCommand
public abstract class BaseCommand extends Object implements ICommand
Template Method Pattern base class for all player commands.

execute() is the locked-down skeleton (final) — subclasses only override run(). This keeps the contract with InputHandler/GameEngine untouchable while still letting each command define its own behaviour. Classic Open/Closed Principle.

Every command gets a CommandContext injected through the constructor so none of them ever need a direct reference to GameEngine.

  • Field Details

    • ctx

      protected final CommandContext ctx
      Single source of truth for all game state a command may need.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseCommand

      protected BaseCommand(CommandContext ctx)
      Constructs a new command with the given context.
      Parameters:
      ctx - the shared command context for this turn.

  • Method Details

    • execute

      public final CommandResult execute() throws SimulationException, SleepEventException
      Executes this command by delegating to the run() hook method.

      This method is final so nobody can override the top-level flow. All custom logic goes in run().

      Specified by:
      execute in interface ICommand
      Returns:
      a CommandResult indicating the outcome.
      Throws:
      SimulationException - if game rules block the action.
      SleepEventException - to signal a sleep-skip.

    • run

      protected abstract CommandResult run() throws SimulationException, SleepEventException
      Hook method — each concrete command puts its actual logic here.
      Returns:
      a CommandResult indicating the outcome.
      Throws:
      SimulationException - if game rules block the action.
      SleepEventException - to signal a sleep-skip.

    • pause

      protected void pause()
      Shared helper so every command can pause without duplicating code. Flushes buffered output and waits for the player to press ENTER.
